issues.title: FunctionMessage Incorrect message type

comments.body:
Good catch @PabloSanchi !

Apparently the FUNCTION message type is not used currently.  It is not used in our  [OpenAI Function Calling](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/clients/functions/openai-chat-functions.html) impl. either.
We shall see if this message type is ever required as we progress implementing function calling for other models. 

In the meantime if fix the inconsistency.
